evals.prompt: Polish the journal entry show page — it has reactions, comments, images, and rich text sections. Review it and tell me what needs improvement.
evals.expected_output: A structured review covering spatial composition, typography, color, shadows, transitions, and micro-details for the journal entry show page, with specific actionable recommendations.

evals.prompt: The trip cards look generic, make them pop. Review the trip card component design.
evals.expected_output: A review of the TripCard component identifying specific visual improvements — spatial composition, shadow depth, typography hierarchy, accent usage, and CSS extraction opportunities.

evals.prompt: Review the sidebar design — is it polished enough?
evals.expected_output: A review of the Sidebar component evaluating its gradient, animations, icon/label treatment, dark mode behavior, and micro-interaction quality.
